# [EN-01] FBB-ACTIVE — repair testbench against current RTL

> Plan ID `EN-01` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

🟡 **Partial.** RTL exists at `src/fbb_active_path.v`. Witness crate
exists at `crates/fbb-active-witness/`. The dedicated Verilog
testbench `test/tb_fbb_active_path.v` is **stale relative to the
current RTL** and fails to elaborate.

## Repro of the failure (current main / this branch)

```
iverilog -I src -o /tmp/tb_fbb src/*.v test/tb_fbb_active_path.v
# tb_fbb_active_path.v:16: error: port `enable` is not a port of dut.
# tb_fbb_active_path.v:16: error: port `temp_mon` is not a port of dut.
# tb_fbb_active_path.v:16: error: port `activity` is not a port of dut.
# tb_fbb_active_path.v:16: warning: Port 8 (fbb_level) expects 32 bits, got 8.
# 3 error(s) during elaboration.
```

## Plan

1. Read the current `src/fbb_active_path.v` port list (clk, rst_n,
   opcode, path_id, fbb_enable, leakage_mon, standby → fbb_level
   [31:0], active_paths [15:0], leakage_ok, fbb_status [7:0]).
2. Rewrite `test/tb_fbb_active_path.v` to match.
3. Add at least one stimulus that exercises each `fbb_state` value
   and verifies `fbb_level` lands in the expected localparam band.
4. Make the testbench `iverilog`-clean and add it to the cocotb
   harness in `test/Makefile` if not already covered.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `iverilog -I src -o /tmp/tb_fbb src/*.v test/tb_fbb_active_path.v`
      elaborates with zero errors.
- [ ] `vvp /tmp/tb_fbb` reports ALL PASS (or equivalent).
- [ ] R-SI-1 still PASS (`tools/check_no_star.sh src/`).
- [ ] Anchor regression: `sim/tb_canonical.v` still 3 PASS, 0 FAIL.

## R5 honesty

- The mismatch is **pre-existing**, not introduced by the docs PR #71.
- Repairing it is **out of scope** for that docs PR; this issue tracks
  the follow-up.
- No silicon-side FBB measurement is claimed by closing this issue —
  only that the simulation testbench compiles and exercises the FSM.
